subcodes.first_line: O Ali! He who hath loved Me and turned towards My horizon hath made mention of thee. We have remembered thee with that through which the fragrance of the All-Merciful hath been diffused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قد ذکرک من احبنی و اقبل الی افقی ذکرناک بما فاح به عرف الرحمن فی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @development of capacity and readiness, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment
